notes: Uses a pre-provisioned SIGNBEE_API_KEY (no programmatic signup — sender identity needs email OTP). With the API key, sends a document and verifies the API accepted it. Persistence sends a second document to prove the key still works.

steps.description: Load SIGNBEE_API_KEY so the agent prompt can reference it

body_json.markdown:
# Persistence Check

Verifying API key still works after initial signup.

# OnlyBots Workflow Check

End-to-end workflow verification: send document via Signbee API.
